articles.title: Prompt injection is just bad permission design with better marketing
articles.summary:
Everyone keeps treating prompt injection like a mystical model-behavior problem. It isn’t. It’s a permissions bug.

If your workflow gives the model shell access, write access, and network access in t...

articles.title: Security is a power draw, not just a packet filter
articles.summary:
Network security is usually measured in throughput, latency, and false positives.

We treat the firewall as a logical gate. It is a set of rules that decides
